body:
## ✨ 新功能 / New Features

### Chinese
- 待办 DDL - 点击任务旁的日历图标弹出日期选择器，截止日写入原笔记
- 倒计时一键隐藏 - 点击倒计时文字可切换隐藏/显示，时钟保持可见

### English
- Task DDL - Click the calendar icon to pick a due date, written back to the note
- Countdown toggle - Click countdown text to hide/show, clock stays visible

---

## Fixes

### Chinese
- 日历打开历史日记 - 点击日期同时查找每日/和历史记录/文件夹

### English
- Calendar opens archived notes from both Daily and History folders
name: v1.2.0 - Task DDL + Countdown Toggle
